features.name: always_ff async reset with constant reset value
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with asynchronous reset where the reset assignment uses a constant value
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clock or posedge arst) begin if (arst) reg <= 2'h0; else reg <= data; end

features.name: localparam constant in always_ff reset path
features.description: Code should include a localparam constant used in an always_ff block's asynchronous reset assignment
features.snippet: localparam W = 8; always_ff @(posedge clock or posedge arst) begin if (arst) reg <= W; else reg <= data; end

features.name: constant used before definition in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a constant value used in an always_ff block before its definition point in the block, requiring hoisting to block beginning
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clock) begin if (cond) out <= C; out <= in; end localparam C = 1;
